texto: Candidate Obama was either exceptionally naive or willfully disingenuous when he vowed to change the way Washington works. The very promise of Hope and Change was rooted in uprooting the Washington modus operandi. But instead of rejecting it, he embraced it all - the secrecy, the closed doors, the political favors, the near-criminal negligence.
explicacao: Citação de Reince Priebus sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “Candidate Obama was either exceptionally naive or willfully disingenuous when he vowed to change …” articula trabalho, change, political em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e trabalho.
